heading: Profile Photo and Banner Dimensions
text: Your LinkedIn profile photo should be 400 x 400 pixels at minimum, though uploading at 800 x 800 pixels is recommended for sharpness on high-density screens. The photo is displayed as a circle, so keep your face or logo centered and avoid placing important elements near the corners where they will be cropped off.

heading: Post and Article Image Sizes
text: Single-image posts perform best at 1200 x 627 pixels, which is the standard landscape format for LinkedIn feed posts. 91:1 aspect ratio fills the feed width on both desktop and mobile without cropping, ensuring your complete image is visible to viewers.

heading: Company Page and Event Images
text: Company page logos should be 300 x 300 pixels, displayed as a square. The company cover image follows the same 1584 x 396 pixel dimensions as personal profile banners. For the Life tab on company pages, the main hero image should be 1128 x 376 pixels.

heading: Preparing LinkedIn Images with ToolPic
text: Open ToolPic's Image Crop tool to resize your images to the exact LinkedIn dimensions. Select a custom aspect ratio or enter specific pixel values like 1200 x 627 for feed posts or 400 x 400 for profile photos. The crop tool lets you frame the most important part of your image precisely.
